verses.text: Topa in Moses kiangah, “Faro leh Egypt tungah gimna khat ka tungsak lai ding a, tua khit ciangin hih lai mun panin amah in note hong paisak ding hi. Amah in note hong paisak ciangin note hong hawlkhia mang khin ding hi
Pasal peuhmah in a vengte kiang pan, numei peuhmah in zong a vengte' kiang mah panin ngun leh kham kizepnate a nget theihna dingun mite' zakin thu gen in,” a ci hi
Topa in Egypt mite' muhna-ah mite maipha pia hi. Tua thamloin, mipa Moses pen Egypt leitang tung, Faro' nasemte' muhna, leh mite' muhna-ah lian mahmah hi
Moses in Faro' kiangah, “ Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Zankim pawlin Egypt mite' lakah ka pai ding hi
Kumpi tokhom tunga tu Faro' tacil-a kipanin an gawina nunga a om nasem numei tacil dong leh ganhing tacil khempeuh, Egypt gam sungah tacil khempeuh si ding hi
Cikmahin tua bang a om ngeilo, cikmah ciangin zong a omkik ngeilo ding kahna lianpi Egypt leitang tung khempeuhah om ding hi
Ahih hangin Egypt mite leh Israel mite a kilamdangin Topa in bawl hi, ci-in na theihna dingun Israel mite, mihing hita leh ganhing hita leh, ui khat nangawn zong taulo ding hi, ci hi” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Moses in Faro' kiangah, “Na uliante khempeuh keima kiangah hong paisukin, keima kiangah hong kun ding uh a, ‘Nang leh nangmah hong zui khempeuh paikhia un,’ hong ci ding uh hi. Tua khit ciangin kei ka paikhia ding hi,” ci thuah lai hi. Tua ciangin Faro' kiang panin amah a heh mahmahsa-in a paikhia hi
Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah, “Egypt tungah na lamdang tam ka bawl theihna dingin Faro in na thu hong ngailo lai ding hi,” a ci hi
Moses leh Aaron in hih na lamdangte khempeuh Faro' mai-ah a bawl uh hi. Topa in Faro' lungsim khauhsak a, amah in Israel mite a leitang panin paikhiasak lo hi.
